getVaultByIndex(uint256).details: Allows users to browse vaults if they remember approximate creation order

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

registerGuardian(address,address).details: Called when vault owner adds a guardian

registerVault(address).details: Called automatically when vault is created, or manually by user

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

searchByAddressPrefix(bytes4,uint256).details: For users who remember part of their old address

params.addressPrefix: First bytes of the address they remember (e.g., "0x1234")

params.badgeIds: Array of badge IDs the user remembers having

searchByCreationTime(uint256,uint256,uin.details: Helps users who remember approximately when they created their vault

params.recoveryId: The plaintext recovery ID the user remembers

returns.vault: The vault address if found, address(0) if not

searchByVaultAddress(address).details: User may have their vault address saved from transaction history

searchByWalletAddress(address).details: User may have their old address saved in email confirmations, browser history, etc.

params.oldWallet: The full wallet address the user remembers

setEmailRecovery(address,bytes32).details: Email is hashed client-side before sending to preserve privacy

params.phoneHash: keccak256(normalized phone number with country code)

setRecoveryId(address,string).details: User provides plaintext, we hash it. User must remember their recovery ID.

params.recoveryId: Plaintext recovery ID (e.g., "john.doe.2024" or unique phrase)  Example: User sets recoveryId = "mygrandma'sbirthdayplus1234" When wallet lost: User enters same phrase → finds vault → initiates recovery

setUsername(address,string).details: Human-readable identifier, must be unique across all vaults

params.username: Desired username (will be lowercased and hashed)

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

updateActivity(address).details: Called on significant vault actions to track activity

updateBadgeFingerprint(address).details: Called periodically or when badges change to enable badge-based lookup

getTotalVaults().notice: Get total number of registered vaults

getVaultInfo(address).notice: Get detailed vault info for search results

isRecoverable(address).notice: Check if vault has recovery options set up

isRecoveryIdAvailable(string).notice: Check if a recovery ID is available

isUsernameAvailable(string).notice: Check if a username is available

registerGuardian(address,address).notice: Register a guardian relationship for lookup

registerVault(address).notice: Register a vault in the searchable registry

searchByAddressPrefix(bytes4,uint256).notice: Search vaults by partial old wallet address

searchByCreationTime(uint256,uint256,uin.notice: Search vaults created in a time range

searchByGuardian(address).notice: Get all vaults a guardian is protecting

searchByVaultAddress(address).notice: Search vault by vault address directly

searchByWalletAddress(address).notice: Search vault by full old wallet address

setEmailRecovery(address,bytes32).notice: Set email hash for recovery lookup

setPhoneRecovery(address,bytes32).notice: Set phone hash for recovery lookup

setRecoveryId(address,string).notice: Set a recovery ID for vault lookup

setUsername(address,string).notice: Set a unique username for vault lookup
